title: Deferred assertions are not yet supported
body:
Hi,

I am trying to clean up my test suite by using `assert();` well. However, there appears to be no good way to schedule assertions for scanning wire values. Assertions appear to evaluate in the middle of voltage changes, rather than as the very last part of the simulator tick, after everything else.

I see that the logging system offers three different schedule semantics: `$display`, `$monitor`, and `$strobe`. How can we improve the schedule semantics for assertions, so that they will not process too early (or too late)?

As a workaround, I am temporarily replacing `assert (<condition>)` in my test suites with `if (!<condition>) $error(<message>)`, and wrapping that inside of an `#0` to ensure that it evaluates at the proper time.

Example:

https://github.com/mcandre/toys/tree/master/rtl/systemverilog/half_adder
